_README_FIRST: This file controls the automatic power schedule. Your web interface or manual edits will change this file. Valid values for the 'state' property are documented below.

__HELP_VALID_STATES__.awake: Kiosk stays fully active and turned on during these hours.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.screen-off: PC stays on (accessible via SSH), but the monitor backlight turns completely off to save power.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.suspend: Sleep to RAM. Super fast wake-up, drops machine into a very low-power state.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.hibernate: Sleep to Disk. Zero power drain. Requires Linux swap space.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.hybrid-sleep: Saves state to disk AND sleeps to RAM.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.off: Complete shutdown. Motherboard RTC timer will physically turn the PC back on at the open hour.

=================== LIVE CONFIGURATION =: Edit the active schedule states using the keywords from the list above.
